# NWBrowser.Result.Metadata.bonjour(_:)

**Case**

A TXT record associated with a discovered service.

## Declaration

```swift
case bonjour(NWTXTRecord)
```

## Metadata Types

- **NWBrowser.Result.Metadata.none**: A value indicating that no associated data was discovered on a service.
